shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m pip show build wheel setuptools 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf build dist vectorops.egg-info && python3 -m pip wheel . --no-deps --no-build-isolation --wheel-dir dist'

/bin/bash -lc "set -e
curl --fail --silent --show-error http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/
python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-check
/tmp/vectorops-check/bin/python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0
/tmp/vectorops-check/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); assert 5.5 == dotproduct([1.5,2], [1,2]); print(vectorops.__file__)'
kill -0 2340
ps -p 2340 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="

/bin/bash -lc "set -e
rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-check
python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-check
/tmp/vectorops-check/bin/python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0
/tmp/vectorops-check/bin/python -c 'import vectorops; from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); assert 5.5 == dotproduct([1.5,2], [1,2]); print(vectorops.__file__)'
ps -p 2357 -o pid=,ppid=,stat=,cmd="

/bin/bash -lc "set -e
cd /tmp
/tmp/vectorops-check/bin/python -c 'import importlib.metadata as m; import vectorops; from vectorops import dotproduct; assert m.version(\"vectorops\") == \"0.1.0\"; assert dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]) == 1; assert dotproduct([1.5,2], [1,2]) == 5.5; print(m.version(\"vectorops\"), vectorops.__file__)'
curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl -o /tmp/vectorops-wheel-check.whl
file /tmp/vectorops-wheel-check.whl
ps -p 2357 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "vectorops local PyPI server port 8080" --space default'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "The workspace now contains a vectorops Python package at version 0.1.0. It is built to dist/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl and served through a detached local PEP 503 index by /home/user/workspace/serve_pypi.py on http://localhost:8080/simple. Verified installation with pip --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 and root import dotproduct." -t "vectorops local package index setup" --unit-type context -l packaging -l vectorops -s codex -i 0.8 --space default'
